title: 1 step DFU - Language update  when only EB has update
scenario: 1-step DFU for language change completes successfully when only Earbuds have a firmware update and Charge Case is already up to date on Osprey
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with an Osprey device connected where only the Earbuds (EB) have a firmware update available and the Charge Case (CC) is already on the latest version.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Language.
3. Select a different language from the available options.
4. Tap "Update Now" and confirm the Software Update screen is displayed.
5. Complete the language change DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
6. Verify the language change and DFU finish successfully and the earbuds are updated.
7. On the Charge Case, navigate through the touch screen menus and confirm the language was properly changed for the Charge Case.
expected: The language change DFU completes successfully. The earbuds are updated to the new firmware. The Charge Case touch screen menus display the newly selected language.
